issue.message: Duplicate id @+id/btn_sort, defined or included multiple times in layout/activity_collection_detail.xml: [layout/activity_collection_detail.xml => layout/layout_collection_header.xml defines @+id/btn_sort, layout/activity_collection_detail.xml => layout/layout_collection_header_collapsed.xml defines @+id/btn_sort]

issue.message: Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/gray_900` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@android:style/Theme.Holo`)
